description:
Generate a Profit and Loss Statement for Northwind Traders for the period from 2024-03-01 to 2024-03-31. Record the Total Income, Total Expenses, and Net Profit in a file at /home/ga/Documents/pnl_report.txt using the following exact format (numeric values only, no currency symbols):

Total Income: <amount>
Total Expenses: <amount>
Net Profit: <amount>
